curl-to-fetch.cardInputDescription: Paste a cURL command and convert it into JavaScript fetch code.
curl-to-fetch.cardOutputDescription: Review and copy the generated fetch code.
curl-to-fetch.invalidCurl: Provided cURL command is not valid.
curl-to-fetch.title: cURL to Fetch converter
curl-to-fetch.warningsDescription: Some parts of the cURL command may not map perfectly to fetch.
